scripts.build: vite build && npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-html
scripts.build:prod: vite build --mode production && npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-html
scripts.copy-html: cp src/popup/index.html dist/popup.html && cp src/content/styles.css dist/content.css
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../fortifykey-extension.zip .
